In an effort to capitalize on the post-[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] era and [[Rebellion era]] wounded battlefield soldiers, [[TelBrinTel Corporation|TelBrinTel]] created the '''GHT-series Medevac unit''', also known as the '''GHT medevac droid'''.

==Characteristics==
This speedy little [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was designed to locate wounded soldiers during combat and either see to their wounds in the field, or drag the soldier back to a mobile medical facility. The droid was not a dedicated [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and was only able to make a diagnostic of the soldier's wounds and apply the most basic of first aid.

Another downside to the GHT line was that the location of each wounded soldier had to be uploaded directly into the droid's [[Droid brain/Legends|brain]] before it could locate the individual. Later modifications would add auto-map software to the droids, in a effort to speed up the retrieval process.

==History==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] snubbed these droids in favor of dedicated medical droids. This caused the majority of the GHT line to find their way into the hands of mercenaries and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces used the GHT almost exclusively. Soldiers were given [[medical transponder]]s which, when activated, would "call" a GHT to his location for aid. In an effort to hamper the droids, the Empire would flood areas with false transponder signals. When the droids arrived at the scene, Imperial sharpshooters would pick them off one by one.

[[Churhee's Riflemen]] used GHT medevac droids to retrieve their wounded.<ref name="Galaxy at War">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>
